name: ephor
description: Root workspace for vulos-relay. The publishable package is in client/. Dev scripts (screenshots, etc.) are in scripts/.

scripts.screenshots: cd scripts && npm ci --prefer-offline 2>/dev/null || npm ci && node screenshots.mjs
scripts.notices:go: node scripts/gen-third-party-notices.mjs --no-npm --go-dir . --out THIRD-PARTY-NOTICES-GO.txt --title "Vulos Relay daemons (Go binaries)"
